title: Photograph Riddle
text: Pointing to a photograph, a man said, 'I have no brother or sister, but that man's father is my father's son.' Who is in the photograph?
explanation: 'My father's son' with no siblings means the man himself. So 'that man's father' is the speaker. Therefore the man in the photograph is the speaker's son.

title: Five Generations
text:
A is B's sister. C is B's mother. D is C's father. E is D's mother.
How is A related to D?
explanation: D is C's father, so D is B's grandfather. Since A is B's sister, A is also D's granddaughter.
